checks.inputs: Initial deployed smoke run: 14/25 — ALL security headers missing on static routes; assets edge path serves static routes without invoking the Worker on env deploys (run_worker_first true AND ["/*"] both not honored; verified via cold-path probes with cf-cache-status MISS)

checks.unresolvedRisk: production static routes remain headerless until an authorized production deploy ships public/_headers

blockers.impact: Cannot apply migrations to a hosted staging project, configure OAuth providers, or run RLS tests against hosted infra; isolated local Supabase stack (Docker) is used for migration + RLS evidence instead
blockers.requiredHumanAction: Create a dedicated Supabase staging project; provide URL + publishable key (and service-role key via approved secret store, never CI) ; configure Google/Apple OAuth + magic-link templates per docs
